title: Strolid Website Content Strategy and Messaging Guide
summary: This document outlines the content strategy and messaging for the Strolid website, detailing hero sections, core pillars, how-it-works flows, intelligence engine modules, and specific landing page content for Sales BDC, Service BDC, and the Intelligence Engine. It also provides a site map, messaging hierarchy, and critical considerations for LLM and search engine relevance, along with an extensive FAQ section.
text:
Homepage Hero (3 options)
Hero Option A (best for clarity + scale)
Headline: NEVER MISS WITH STROLID
A Smarter BDC—Powered by People, Strengthened by AI.
Subhead:
Strolid delivers sales and service communications with consistent follow-up, full CRM transparency, and an AI co-pilot that helps our team & your team perform without replacing the human touch.
STOng Process SOLID Results- That’s Strolid
Primary CTA: See How It Works
Secondary CTA: Talk to Our Team

Hero Option B (GM-forward “nuts & bolts”)
Headline: NEVER MISS WITH STROLID
More Conversations. More Appointments. Full Visibility.
Subhead:
Outsource your BDC without losing control. Strolid combines trained agents, disciplined processes, and an AI co-pilot that improves every call, text, and note, directly inside your CRM.
STOng Process SOLID Results- That’s Strolid
CTAs same as above.

Hero Option C (Owner/Corp-forward “differentiator”)
Headline: NEVER MISS WITH STROLID
The Outsourced BDC You Can’t Compare to In-House.
Subhead:
Strolid pairs high-quality people with a dealer-specific intelligence engine, reporting, signals, conversational search, AI follow-up, and an agent co-pilot, so performance improves over time.
STOng Process SOLID Results- That’s Strolid
CTAs same as above.

Hero “proof bar” (directly under hero)
Use 5 quick bullets (not numbers unless you’re confident you’ll keep them current):
Sales + Service coverage
CRM-integrated notes & outcomes
Human handoff built in
Visibility through reporting + AI alerts
STOng Process SOLID Results- That’s Strolid
(If you want metrics later: response time, contact rate, appointment rate—keep those on a “Results” page.)

The 3 Pillars (homepage section)
Pillar 1: Visibility & Control
Headline: You manage what you can see.
Copy: Every customer interaction is captured, summarized, and pushed to your CRM so managers can coach, audit, and improve outcomes with confidence.
Proof points (4 bullets):
Conversation summaries and notes in CRM
Reporting that highlights activity and outcomes
Signals/alerts when follow-up breaks or opportunity heats up
With Strolid you see it all 

Pillar 2: Consistent Process & Performance Without the Hiring Cycle
Headline: STROng Process SOLID Results- That’s Strolid
Copy: Trained people + disciplined process deliver the persistence most stores struggle to maintain, without recruiting, turnover, and coverage gaps.
Proof points:
Structured follow-up cadence that doesn’t fade
Quality control + coaching across agents
Coverage that stays consistent when dealerships get busy
Speed to lead, call and text

Pillar 3: Human + AI Advantage
Headline: AI gives the facts, Humans make the promise.
Copy: Our Dealer/Agent Co-Pilot helps agents respond faster, speak better, and document cleaner while Sophia handles follow-up coverage and hands off to humans when customers engage.
Proof points:
Dealer/Agent Co-Pilot (real-time assist)
Sophia for Long term Follow up coverage that connects with a human
Sophia for inbound Service that connects to humans for complex customer questions
Strolid Search & GPT- Sort conversations based on Price, trade, payment and more 

“How it Works” (simple 4-step diagram)
Keep it visual and short:
Lead arrives (forms, marketplaces, OEM, etc.)
Human response day 1–2 (calls/texts/emails)
Sophia follow-up day 3/5/7/10 (connects or closes out dispositions)
Everything pushed to CRM + reported (with alerts and insights)
Add one line:
“Dealers get the benefits of automation without losing accountability.”

The Strolid Intelligence Engine (module grid)
This is where you “expose the tech” without turning the site into a product catalog.
Section headline:
Powered by the Strolid Intelligence Engine
Section subhead:
Tools that make humans better and managers more informed, without adding complexity.
Tiles (1 sentence each):
Dealer/Agent Co-Pilot — Real-time guidance for better calls, faster replies, and cleaner CRM notes.
Sophia Follow-Up AI (with human assistance)— Persistent day 3/5/7/10 outreach with instant human handoff when customers engage.
Sophia Inbound Service AI (with human assistance)
Strolid is the only company that backs their AI up with humans for complex calls that need escalation. 
Strolid Signals — Alerts for hot opportunities, missed follow-up, and emerging issues across rooftops.
Conversational Search — Ask questions across every conversation to find patterns, objections, and opportunities.
Strolid GPT — Dealer-specific intelligence that helps summarize, respond, and coach at scale.
Reporting — Transparent dashboards that show performance, activity, and outcomes.
(You can keep it to 7 tiles if you want less. If so, combine GPT + Search into one “Dealer Intelligence” tile.)

The Progression Ladder (vision without confusion)
Section headline:
Your BDC evolves in stages
Stage 1 — Foundation: Great humans + process
Stage 2 — Visibility: CRM transparency + reporting + coaching
Stage 3 — Intelligence at Scale: Co-Pilot + Signals + GPT/Search + Sophia coverage
One line under it:
Start with better follow-up. Grow into a dealership intelligence system.

Split by Audience (reduces the “GM vs Corporate” dilemma)
Section headline:
Choose your path
Card 1: For GMs & Sales Managers
“Appointments, process, response, coverage”
CTA: See the playbook
Card 2: For Owners & Corporate
“Visibility, governance, scalability, tech roadmap”
CTA: See the operating model
This keeps the homepage clean while still serving both buyers.

Final section: The human promise 
Headline:
Great people still win. We just give them superpowers.
Copy:
Strolid is built on relationships, disciplined follow-up, and transparency. The technology exists to make those strengths consistent at scale.

Below are (1) Sales BDC landing page, (2) Service BDC landing page, and (3) Intelligence Engine page—plus a one-page site map + messaging hierarchy at the end so your team has a single source of truth.

1) Sales BDC Landing Page (ready-to-paste copy)
Hero
Headline: Outsourced Sales BDC that performs without losing control.
Subhead: Strolid combines trained agents, disciplined follow-up, and an AI co-pilot that assists (not replaces) so you get more real conversations, more appointments, and full visibility in your CRM.
Primary CTA: Book a Demo
Secondary CTA: See How It Works
Proof Bar (pick 4)
Human response + persistent follow-up cadence
CRM-integrated notes and outcomes
Dealer/Agent Co-Pilot to improve quality
Reporting + signals for visibility and accountability
The problem we solve
Most dealers don’t lose leads on day one, they lose them on day three and beyond when follow-up fades, notes get thin, and managers can’t see what’s happening.
What you get with Strolid
1) Consistent follow-up that doesn’t quit
We run a disciplined cadence that stays consistent even when your store gets busy.
2) Better conversations (not just more attempts)
Our agents are trained to be helpful, professional, and on-brand supported by a co-pilot that improves responses and documentation.
3) Total visibility in your CRM
Every customer interaction is captured and pushed to your CRM so management can coach, audit, and improve.
How it works (simple)
Lead arrives (forms, marketplaces, OEM, etc.)
Human engagement starts immediately (day 1–2)
Persistent follow-up continues (including AI-assisted coverage where appropriate)
Outcomes + notes pushed to CRM and reported
Why we’re different
People + process + a dealer-specific intelligence engine
Other outsourced BDCs give you labor. In-house gives you control but struggles with consistency and scale. Strolid gives you both—and improves over time.
What managers care about (nuts & bolts section)
Coverage and follow-up consistency
Appointment setting process
CRM hygiene (notes, dispositions, outcomes)
Coaching visibility (what’s working / what’s not)
What owners/corporate care about
Transparent reporting and accountability
Scalability across rooftops/groups
A tech roadmap that increases advantage over time
CTA (end)
Ready to see it on your leads?
Book a demo and we’ll walk through the workflow, CRM outputs, and reporting.

2) Service BDC Landing Page (ready-to-paste copy)
Hero
Headline: Service appointments depend on speed, clarity, and follow-through.
Subhead: Strolid helps convert service inquiries into scheduled appointments with consistent outreach, clear communication, and full CRM visibility supported by AI that assists your team behind the scenes.
Primary CTA: Book a Demo
Secondary CTA: See How It Works
Proof Bar (pick 4)
Fast response to your calls 
Clear appointment-setting workflow
CRM/Scheduler-integrated notes and outcomes
Reporting + issue signals (missed calls, friction)
The problem we solve
Service opportunities get lost when customers can’t get quick answers, follow-up & escalations break, or notes that don't reflect what the customer actually needed.
What you get with Strolid
1) More booked appointments from existing demand
We focus on converting calls to scheduled time slots with disciplined follow through.
2) Better customer experience without guessing
Clear, helpful communication, supported by our AI Dialer and co-pilot that keeps messaging consistent and reduces errors.
3) Visibility that helps the service manager
Reporting and signals highlight what’s driving conversions and where follow-up is breaking.
How it works
Customer calls service and connects to humans, AI or our Hybrid that combines both. 
Strolid engages quickly and keeps the call consistent
Appointment is scheduled or clearly dispositioned
Notes and outcomes pushed to CRM/Scheduler + reported
Common service use cases (bullets)
Appointment scheduling and rescheduling
Unanswered inquiry follow-up
Missed calls / missed messages recovery
Confirmations and “close the loop” communication
Why we’re different
Most solutions optimize one channel. Strolid optimizes the whole follow-up system—people, AI, process, and intelligence, so results stay consistent and so we Never Miss. 
CTA (end)
Want to see how we handle real service inquiries?
Book a demo and we’ll walk through the process and reporting.

3) Intelligence Engine Page (Search, GPT, Signals, Sophia, Reporting, Co-Pilot)
Hero
Headline: Technology that makes humans better and managers smarter.
Subhead: The Strolid Intelligence Engine powers better conversations, cleaner CRM data, proactive alerts, and dealer-specific learning, without replacing the people who build trust.
Primary CTA: See It In Action
Secondary CTA: Talk to Our Team
The positioning (short)
Strolid’s tech isn’t a separate product you have to “implement.”
It’s how our BDC delivers better outcomes and improves over time.
Modules (tile-style copy)
Dealer/Agent Co-Pilot
Real-time assist for agents to improve calls, replies, and CRM notes—faster, cleaner, more consistent.
Sophia Follow-Up AI (with human assistance)
Persistent outreach on your cadence to surface engaged customers, warm-transfer to humans, and capture dispositions so you stop wasting calls.
Sophia Inbound Service AI (with human assistance)
Never miss a call to your service department. Sohpia is a 24/7 agent that books appointments for your dealership. Strolid is the only company that backs their AI up with humans for complex calls that need escalation. 
Strolid Signals
Proactive alerts that highlight hot opportunities, missed follow-up, and recurring friction—so managers can intervene early.
Conversational Search
Search and analyze conversations at scale to find patterns, objections, and opportunities across stores, teams, and regions.
Strolid GPT
Dealer-specific intelligence that helps summarize, respond, coach, and standardize best practices—trained on your data, not competitors’.
Reporting
Transparent dashboards for performance, activity, and outcomes—built to drive action, not just metrics.
How this supports your 3 pillars (tie-back)
Visibility & Control: Reporting + Signals + CRM outputs
Consistent Performance: Process + QA + assisted documentation
Human + AI Advantage: Co-Pilot + Sophia + Search + GPT
CTA (end)
Want a walkthrough of how this shows up inside the workflow?
We’ll demo the “before/after” on real lead and service scenarios.

One-page Site Map + Messaging Hierarchy (the “stop debating” doc)
Top-level message (one sentence)
Strolid is a tech-enabled, human BDC for sales and service—delivering consistent follow-up, more conversations, and full CRM visibility—powered by an intelligence engine that assists, not replaces.
Primary navigation (recommended)
Home (what we do + why we’re different)
Sales BDC (nuts & bolts + outcomes)
Service BDC (nuts & bolts + outcomes)
How It Works (workflow + cadence + CRM outputs)
Intelligence Engine (modules: Co-Pilot, Sophia, Signals, Search, GPT, Reporting)
Results (case studies, proof, testimonials)
About (people + values + story)
Contact / Demo
Homepage hierarchy (what each audience sees)
Above the fold: one clear offer + “people + AI assist” + control/visibility
3 Pillars:
Visibility & Control
Consistent Performance
Human + AI Advantage
Choose your path: GM/Sales Manager vs Owner/Corporate
Proof: results + reporting screenshots + CRM notes examples
Vision: progression ladder (Foundation → Visibility → Intelligence at Scale)
Where each product belongs (no confusion)
Dealer/Agent Co-Pilot: Pillar 3 + Intelligence Engine
Sophia: Pillar 3 + How It Works (cadence) + Intelligence Engine
Signals: Pillar 1 + Intelligence Engine
Conversational Search: Pillar 3 (as “dealer intelligence”) + Intelligence Engine
Strolid GPT: Pillar 3 + Intelligence Engine
Reporting: Pillar 1 + Results page (proof)

CONTENT TO IMPROVE RELEVANCE WITH LLM AND SEARCH ENGINES- We have some of this content already built on the current Strolid site 
Here are the critical misses I see most frequently (and what you should make sure the new Strolid site includes):
1) Clear “what you are” + who you serve (entity clarity)
LLMs need unambiguous statements like:
“Strolid is a managed automotive BDC + AI engagement platform for dealership groups.”
“We support Sales internet leads, inbound sales calls, service inbound/backstop overflow, and outbound campaigns.”
“We serve dealer groups and multi-rooftop operations.”
If the site is vague/poetic, LLMs can’t confidently categorize you.
2) Dedicated pages for each core offering (not just one “Solutions” page)
You should have separate, indexable pages for:
Sales BDC (internet leads) (Essentials / Expanded / Entire)
Inbound Sales Call Handling
Service Inbound + Backstop Overflow (ring-to-dealer then forward after X rings)
Outbound Campaigns (human)
Sophia AI (outbound follow-up + service inbound) with human handoffs
MODCOM 24/7 personalized lead response
Client Success / Onboarding / Training / QA (these matter a lot for enterprise procurement)
LLMs “rank” you better when each offering is described concretely on its own page.
3) Proof and specificity (numbers, outcomes, examples)
LLMs pull “best vendor” answers from sites with:
clear KPIs you impact (speed-to-lead, contact rate, set/show/sold)
benchmarks/targets you manage to (even ranges)
case studies (even short ones)
logos or named dealer groups (if allowed)
“what you get” lists (CS Director, portal, reporting, GPT, Signals, dialer, conversational search)
4) A “How it works” / workflow page
A simple flow explaining:
lead intake → auto assignment → attempts cadence → escalation/TO → appointment confirm → CRM notes → reporting
where AI helps (Signals, GPT, conversational search, summaries, QA)
where humans are required (high-intent calls, complex objections, handoffs)
This is huge for LLM comprehension.
5) Pricing or at least “Pricing approach”
You don’t need full pricing public, but LLMs do better with:
packages
volume bands
“talk to us” + what pricing depends on (volume, coverage hours, channels, rooftops)
You already built a clean one-pager—great. Consider a light public “Pricing approach” page.
6) Trust, compliance, and enterprise readiness
LLMs and buyers look for:
TCPA/texting consent approach, DNC/opt-out handling
data security posture (SOC 2 if applicable, or roadmap)
PII handling
call recording disclosures (if relevant)
“human-in-the-loop” safety
Even a short “Security & Compliance” page helps a lot.
7) Strong About / Leadership / Contact signals
LLMs trust sites with real-world anchors:
leadership names/titles
locations
phone number + email
careers page
company history
8) FAQ pages that match how dealers actually ask questions
These feed LLMs directly. Examples:
“Do you replace my BDC or support it?”
“How fast do you respond to leads?”
“How do you handle missed calls in service?”
“Can you work with Lithia’s workflows?”
“How do you do QA?”
“How do AI + humans work together?”
“Can you run hybrid (dealer handles first touch, you handle follow-up)?”
9) Technical indexability (quiet killer)
Make sure:
pages render server-side (not JS-only)
no accidental noindex
sitemap.xml + clean internal linking
fast pages
each product page has its own URL and real text (not all graphics)
10) Structured data (schema)
Add basic schema.org:
Organization, LocalBusiness (if relevant), Product/Service, FAQPage, Article
This improves extraction for AI systems.

If you want the “don’t miss anything” checklist for Strolid Auto specifically
Make sure the site explicitly names these capabilities (in plain language):
Managed Sales BDC (24/7 optional)
Service inbound + backstop overflow after X rings
Inbound sales call handling
Outbound campaigns (human) and aged/dormant follow-up
Sophia AI for outbound + inbound service with human handoff
Auto lead assignment (speed-to-lead)
Agent dialer
Portal + reporting (rooftop + group rollups)
Strolid GPT + Signals + conversational search
Client Success Director model + onboarding timeline + training + QA (% audited)
FAQ
1. What makes Strolid different from other BDCs or AI tools?
Strolid blends AI efficiency with trained human specialists making us the only true AI co-pilot in automotive.
We capture and analyze every conversation, respond faster than in-house teams, and offer a human escape hatch whenever a customer needs a real person. No other solution combines people, process, AI, and conversation intelligence in one unified system.
3. Will AI replace my staff or take control of conversations?
No.
AI handles speed, scale, and automation. Humans handle trust, nuance, and commitment.
Strolid uses AI where it helps and people where it matters, ensuring customers get fast, accurate answers without losing the relationship.
4. What insights will Strolid give me that my CRM can’t?
Your CRM shows notes, Strolid shows the full conversation.
We make every call, text, email, and chat searchable so you can see:
What customers are asking
Why they’re hesitating
Complaint spikes
Price objections
Missed opportunities
Patterns across rooftops
It’s clarity dealers have never had before.
5. How does Strolid reduce my operational headaches?
Strolid eliminates:
Missed calls
Delayed follow-up
Poor notes
Inconsistent BDC execution
Staffing turnover
Training and coaching burden
Multi-system blind spots
You get a consistent, accountable engagement engine without the cost and chaos of doing it yourself.
6. Is this scalable for large stores or dealer groups?
Absolutely.
Strolid is designed for single rooftops and large groups that need:
Standardized process
Unified communication
AI-enhanced reporting
Group-level insights
Lower operational overhead
OEMs also benefit from brand consistency and conversational intelligence across their network.
7. How do I know Strolid will represent my brand well?
Because every interaction is both human-reviewed and transparent to you in our Portal.
Our agents are trained to sound like your store, not a call center.
Our Dialer- gives them access to all of your business data
Our AI tools guide consistent process and tone, while humans step in whenever emotion, urgency, or complexity requires it.
You get speed without losing personality and transparency into every conversation.

8. What if customers ask questions AI can’t answer?
This is exactly where Strolid outperforms everyone else.
AI is great for answering common questions, but only humans can guarantee price, payment, credit approval, availability, or trade values.
Strolid is built on a simple truth:
AI answers questions. Humans make promises.
The moment a customer needs a commitment, we route the conversation to the right human instantly — avoiding frustration and lost deals.
9. What kind of ROI should a dealership expect?
Dealers typically see:
More appointments from old leads
Faster response times
Higher contact rates
Fewer missed opportunities
Improved CSI
Increased sales and service revenue
Plus: no hiring, training, turnover, or management burden.
Because we unify conversations and automate the busy work, your team focuses on closing — not chasing.
